title: ConfluenceDecision
description: Single handoff decision object per docs/theory/CONFLUENCE-FRAMEWORK.md §7. Fuses IctSnapshot + GannSnapshot. This is the object journaled and shown in the operator portal.

id.description: Stable unique id (uuid recommended); also used as decision_id downstream.

mode.description: R=Reversal, C=Continuation, T=Time-triggered watch, NONE=no actionable mode (CONFLICT/F/fail-closed).

grade.description: Per CONFLUENCE-FRAMEWORK.md §6.2. F = CONFLICT / news_veto / midday-new-entry => NO_TRADE.

score.description: Raw points per §6.1, after soft penalties §6.3. Practical range ~0-9.

agreement.description: Direction agreement matrix result per §4, prior to grading. NONE when either engine has insufficient quality to evaluate.

reasons.description: Human-readable + stable reason chips per §5, e.g. "ICT_SWEEP_ALH", "GANN_SO9", "KZ_NY_OPEN", "ALIGN_SHORT", "CONFLICT". Engine-sourced codes SHOULD be prefixed ICT_/GANN_ (mirroring the raw code from IctSnapshot.reasons / GannSnapshot.reasons) so the UI can route reason chips back to the source engine panel. Not a closed enum here because of the ICT_*/GANN_* combinatorial prefix — see README open question on the canonical reason-code catalog.

type.description: Zone type backing the entry, e.g. OB, FVG, or a composite label.

stop.description: Invalidation price. Per §8 conflict rule: if ICT stop and Gann stop disagree, the wider stop is used in paper.

targets.description: T1, T2, ... per §8. May be empty when mode=T (watch-only, no trade plan yet).

invalid_if.description: Mandatory hard-invalidation conditions (design principle §2.4). Required non-empty whenever mode != NONE.

ict_ref.description: Reference to the source IctSnapshot (e.g. its asof instant or a snapshot id).

gann_ref.description: Reference to the source GannSnapshot (e.g. its asof instant or a snapshot id).

automation.description: Confluence-layer automation policy per §6.2, prior to the Risk Gate (RiskVerdict) which may further downgrade allow/confirm to deny.

weights_version.description: confluence_weights_version in effect when this decision was scored. Must be frozen/versioned per RISKS §Overfit weights (GROK-DECISION-001) — never silently changed.
